item.title: Redhead Monday
item.description: I'm a redhead, not this redhead obviously. This reminds me of my 20's. Only swap the espresso martinis for kamikaze shots.
item.dc:creator: HolyHellJezebel

item.title: Poppy Porca
item.description: Sorry for the delay in comic updates! But here’s a little gift- a Poppy Orca! So happy to have rescued our senior girl. Also, "Porca" apparently means sIut (and a few other things like pig I think) in Italian. Our vet laughed and told us this. Still accurate, we stand by her nickname. Vet even agreed. Poppy is a little huss and loves everyone she gets her paws on. Want to see more comics, check out my webtoons: https://www.webtoons.com/en/challenge/ristay/list?title_no=170400&page=1
item.dc:creator: ristay

item.title: I don’t know why men fight so hard against male pattern baldness, just rock the cue ball.

item.title: 光復香港 Free Hong Kong 時代革命 Revolution Now
item.description: 香港應該被視為世界的香港、國際的香港，自由世界的前緣，抵抗極權的香港！
